name: Fresh Coconut Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------MERINGUE-------------------------
1. In a medium saucepan, combine milk, 1/2 cup sugar, salt, and grated coconut. Cook until the mixture is very hot.
2. Beat egg yolks in a bowl.
3. Blend cornstarch and water into the egg yolks.
4. Add the egg yolk mixture to the milk mixture. Stir constantly until thickened, about 1 minute.
5. Add butter and vanilla. Pour the filling into the pastry shell.
6. To make meringue, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until soft peaks form.
7. Gradually add 1 tablespoon sugar for each egg white used, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
8. Spread the meringue over the filling, making sure it is sealed to the edge of the pie shell.
9. Sprinkle with grated coconut.
10. Bake at 400°F until golden brown, about 10 minutes. Cool completely.
Makes 6 to 8 servings
